Core_Features: Dual-Laser LiDAR, Auto-Empty & Wash Station, 8000Pa Suction
Description: The ultimate premium robot vacuum. It delivers flawless cleaning performance with advanced mapping technology, AI obstacle avoidance, and a self-emptying base that holds up to 60 days of dirt. Highly recommended for large homes and demanding users.
A strong high-end contender that identifies cables and shoes to avoid getting stuck. The auto-empty dock is highly convenient, though the vacuum can be slightly noisy on its maximum suction setting.

Features a huge onboard dustbin which reduces the frequency of manual emptying. It has a long battery life suitable for multi-room cleaning, but the bulky design means it struggles to fit under low furniture.

Core_Features: Smart Navigation, Vacuum & Mop Combo, 4000Pa Suction
Description: A reliable and affordable robot vacuum that vacuums and mops. It navigates well around furniture and keeps your daily floors clean. Good for standard apartments.
Great for pet owners. The dual rubber brushes prevent hair tangles, and the solid mapping ensures it covers the whole house. The mopping function, however, is very basic.
The unique D-shape allows it to get deep into corners better than round models. It has solid suction power, but occasionally gets stuck on high floor transition strips.
Focuses heavily on hard floors with its sonic scrubbing mopping pad. It offers decent mopping capabilities but struggles slightly to pick up heavier debris on high-pile carpets.
A good entry-level choice into laser mapping. It allows you to set no-go zones via the app. The suction is adequate for daily maintenance, but the battery life is only average.
Designed to fit under very low couches and beds. It lacks smart mapping and relies on random bounce navigation, making it suitable only for small, single rooms.

Core_Features: Gyroscope Navigation, High Suction, Slim Design
Description: A basic but functional vacuum for everyday dust and light debris. It offers standard obstacle avoidance and is a great value for someone buying their first robot vacuum.
